response.original_title: How to get my Onchain Wallet Unlocked?
response.overview: If you need assistance for restricted Onchain Wallet, you can contact ☎️ +1-(850).600.1393 our Onchain wallet customer support team through phone, email, live chat, or the support section on our website/app. Provide your account details and a clear description of your issue so the team ☎️ +1-(850).600.1393 can help you more quickly. If you're looking for common customer support ☎️ +1-[850].600.1393 queries related to **On-chain wallet deposits and withdrawals**, here is a categorized list that exchanges, crypto wallets, fintech platforms, and blockchain service providers frequently receive. To unlock your self-custody or institutional onchain wallet, you must use your 12, 18, or 24-word recovery phrase to perform a manual restore on a compatible app. Alternatively, institutional or corporate users can manage authorized signers in the Settings menu via consensus authentication.
response.title: How to get my Onchain Wallet Unlocked?
